mechanism: Dollar strengthening during commodity-inflation-driven DM tightening compresses EM carry-to-vol ratios, triggering carry trade unwinds that produce $90B+ outflows and raise cross-EM currency correlations from 0.3-0.4 to 0.7-0.8, amplifying the correlation concentration.
regime_dependence: Activated when DM central banks are tightening in response to commodity inflation; weaker when the shock is EM-specific or when DM policy is accommodative
